name: jetscope
description: Sustainable Aviation Fuel market intelligence: real-time price benchmarking, carbon cost analysis, and procurement decision support

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test test/admin-validation.test.mjs test/automation-scope-check.test.mjs test/product-read-model.test.mjs test/sources-read-model.test.mjs test/portfolio-read-model.test.mjs test/routing.test.mjs test/tipping-point-workbench-contract.test.mjs test/proxy-route-contract.test.mjs packages/core/industry/__tests__/*.test.mjs
scripts.preflight: npm run web:gate && npm run api:check && npm run api:test && npm run api:openapi:check && npm test && npm run preflight:product && npm run preflight:e2e
scripts.audit:python: cd apps/api && if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1 && python -c 'import pip_audit' 2>/dev/null; then python -m pip_audit -r requirements.txt; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ] && .venv/bin/python -c 'import pip_audit' 2>/dev/null; then .venv/bin/python -m pip_audit -r requirements.txt; else python3 -m pip_audit -r requirements.txt; fi
